name: Tensor-scope contract
role: Fix identical compressed tensors, exclusions, dtype, and evaluation scope before rate comparison.
replaceable_by: full eligible linear scope; selected MLP-only scope; alternative explicit manifest
notes: Standard reproducibility component; the current verified run uses only six selected MLP linear tensors.

name: Calibration and Hessian proxy
role: Estimate activation covariance / Hessian proxy and component self/cross terms without updating the dense pretrained base.
output_format: per-layer proxy state; Hessian norms and correlations
replaceable_by: diagonal proxy; identity metric; held-out-only ranking
notes: A1 no-backward component; proxy is diagnostic and cannot replace endpoint loss.

name: Base quantization Q
role: Create packed signed quantized codes and scales that define the common base perturbation.
output_format: quantized codes; scale state; Q perturbation
replaceable_by: RTN; GPTQ-style base; alternative bit/group settings
notes: Existing native baseline; charge codes, scales, metadata, padding, and alignment.

name: Scale protection
role: Use block or component scalar degrees of freedom to adjust the amplitude of a compressed component.
output_format: scaled candidate with foldable or stored scale state
replaceable_by: no scale; tensor scale; alternative block size
notes: Existing native mechanism; compare only after charging any non-folded scale state.

name: Sparse support selection S
role: Select a small residual support using magnitude or Hessian/activation importance.
input_format: post-quantization residual; proxy state; byte budget
replaceable_by: magnitude support; Wanda-style support; no sparse component
notes: Indices and row pointers are physical payload, not free parameters.

name: OBS sparse-value repair
role: Re-estimate values on a fixed sparse support so already-paid positions better satisfy local stationarity.
input_format: fixed sparse support; residual; Hessian proxy
output_format: same support with repaired sparse values
replaceable_by: naive residual values; least-squares values; no sparse repair
notes: Existing native mechanism; current bounded run shows improvement over Q+S at identical artifact bytes.

name: Low-rank repair L
role: Approximate the residual in a low-rank factor space without elementwise support indices.
replaceable_by: truncated SVD; randomized SVD; no low-rank component
notes: Existing native mechanism; rank increments are discrete and both factors must be charged.

name: Exact serialized artifact codec
role: Serialize every code, scale, sparse value/support, factor, descriptor, header, padding, and alignment byte and verify round trip.
output_format: hashed decodable artifact; natural and file byte counts
replaceable_by: logical value-stream accounting; nominal bpw accounting
notes: Measurement infrastructure; research codec is not claimed as a production deployment format.

name: Nested global exact-byte allocator
role: Choose among Q, Q+S_OBS, Q+L, and enumerated QSL states using a pruned byte/cost frontier, then verify the complete multi-layer file against the Q+L natural-byte cap.
input_format: component candidate states; local proxy costs; exact serializer oracle; target file cap
output_format: strict-budget heterogeneous endpoint and allocator audit
replaceable_by: legacy per-layer guard; logical-bit allocator; forced-composite allocator; exhaustive multiple-choice knapsack
notes: Implemented on 2026-07-16 but not yet executed. Exact refers to final serializer feasibility; optimality is limited to the enumerated rank/support states and additive Pareto pruning. Prior rate-distortion and allocation work precludes a base novelty claim.

name: Loss-landscape and endpoint gate
role: Probe W+epsilon*(W_hat-W), fit local linear/quadratic terms, and accept claims only from epsilon=1 held-out NLL/PPL plus exact bytes.
input_format: dense and compressed endpoints; held-out windows; epsilon grid
output_format: landscape diagnostics; endpoint metrics; paired comparisons
replaceable_by: proxy-only selection; endpoint-only evaluation without diagnostics
notes: Existing diagnostic; current epsilon grid has 13 fixed points and descriptive fixed-window statistics.

name: Method-factor ablation interface
role: Expose sparse support score, strict OBS refit, S/L order, low-rank fit metric/solver, covariance geometry/damping, whitening floor, and global/local-guard allocation as stage-recorded factors.
input_format: common runner arguments plus per-stage overrides
notes: Implemented and covered by the 15-job matrix. Pythia supplies matched allocator and full-vs-randomized-SVD controls; each other variant retains the same physical codec and selected-tensor scope within its model. The live directory has only two completed_valid CPU controls and thirteen planned rows; separate Qwen outputs are layer-0 gate-only sentinels, so no frontier claim exists.

name: Byte-faithful heterogeneous endpoint audit protocol
role: Bind a declared tensor manifest, complete round-trip file accounting, signed local-PSD interaction diagnostics, and realized same-cap held-out endpoints into one fail-closed evidence contract.
input_format: model/source/config identities; Q/S/L candidates; research serializer; validation/test windows
output_format: hash-bound natural-byte feasibility record and endpoint evidence package
replaceable_by: logical-rate study; proxy-only ranking; endpoint evaluation without artifact round trip
notes: The scoped novelty claim is the executable audit protocol and evidence contract, not the first Q/S/L combination, Hessian-rate method, orthogonality analysis, bitstream, or production codec. New allocator outputs remain partial untracked live state until fail-closed aggregation, review, and commit.

name: Multimodal spectral gate and joint controller
role: Use effective rank, sink/global mass, local/cyclic fit, route stability, output sensitivity, and second-order temporal stability to select dense, global-low-rank, local-structured, dynamic-sparse, cache, and temporal-reuse paths jointly with static weight endpoints.
input_format: per-layer/head/timestep attention diagnostics; weight Q/S/L/OBS candidates; W/A PTQ candidates; cache and runtime profiles
output_format: scope-separated multimodal Pareto candidates with dense fallback and complete static/runtime accounting
replaceable_by: fixed BCCB template; static top-k only; independently optimized PTQ/cache/sparsity; speedup multiplication
notes: Proposed only. Read-only visual diagnostics and QuantSparse/CacheQuant literature motivate interaction-aware gating, but this repository has no HunyuanVideo endpoint, deployment artifact, peak-memory, or end-to-end speed result.
